flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oklahoma State University-Oklahoma City fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (26.9% → 14.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 38% at Oklahoma State University-Oklahoma City vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.4k vs 5.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma State University-Oklahoma City fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Oklahoma State University-Oklahoma City rose 37% between 2006 and 2009 (5.2k → 7.1k).
